lifecycleScripts.afterStart: wp-env run cli -- wp theme activate twentytwentyfive && wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogname 'Blockera Test' && wp-env run cli -- wp user update 1 --display_name='Blockera Author' --user_email='hello@blockera.ai' --user_url='https://blockera.ai' --description='We shape the future of how block editor can change the web!'
